changes: Rewrote StudentDetail presentation to match screens 12+13. Dark ink-800 header with white title 'Perfil do aluno', translucent back/share buttons, Tabs inside dark area. Desempenho tab: PlayerCard in dark container, StatBadges (wins V, losses D, approval %, presence % with icons), Evolution mini bar chart in white card, Partidas recentes section. Dados tab: Avatar 64px + Trocar foto secondary button, form fields (nome, idade/altura row, mao dominante, PositionField, turmas checkboxes, guardian, notes), Save/Delete buttons. Preserved all hooks, form logic, mutations, navigation, loading/empty states, Sheet delete confirmation. Removed old Header import, now uses custom dark header matching the UI kit reference.
